expectations.text: package.json includes sharp as a dependency
setInterval or setTimeout used for per-second countdown
expectations.evidence: tickInterval = setInterval(async () => { ... }, 1000) in startTick() at line 209

expectations.text: MM:SS format countdown is rendered onto the button
expectations.evidence: formatTime() returns padded MM:SS string; mainText = formatTime(secondsLeft) rendered in SVG text element via buildKeyImage()

expectations.text: Button color changes based on timer state (at least two distinct colors for running/done)
expectations.evidence: bgColor '#0d2b0d' (dark green) when running, '#111111' when idle/paused, '#9b1c00' (red) when done
deck.on('down', async (control) => { ... await handlePress(deck) }) at line 301; handlePress() state machine toggles idle/running/paused/done

expectations.text: Reset logic is present (either on DONE click or separate mechanism)
expectations.evidence: handlePress() case 'done': resets secondsLeft = POMODORO_SECONDS and timerState = 'idle' at lines 268-270

expectations.text: No external fetch/HTTP calls — pure local logic
expectations.evidence: Only imports are @elgato-stream-deck/node and sharp; no fetch, http, axios, or network calls present
